en: And action.
Hey, Robbie.
Coach Stan, what are you doing here?
I came to see if everything was okay.
We missed your tryouts today.
I had some stuff I had to do.
Look, Robbie, you're good. What's up?
ko: 봐, 로비, 너 잘하고 있어. 무슨 일이야?

en: You're gonna have scouts lined up
ko: 오늘 너에게 장학금을 주려고 스카우트들이 줄 서 있을 거야.

en: to give you a full ride today. You just gonna throw that all away?
What are you, my dad now? Sorry, guys, stay in the zone.
ko: 너 이제 내 아빠냐? 미안, 얘들아, 집중해.

en: Hey, basketball players? What's up?
So right now you're just sort of passing back and forth. Looks a little bit weird.
ko: 지금 그냥 서로 패스만 하고 있어. 좀 이상해 보여.

en: Just play basketball, you know what I mean?
Just dribble, pass, run some plays, okay?
ko: 드리블하고, 패스하고, 플레이 좀 해봐, 알겠어?

en: All right, sir. Thank you.
Sorry, guys. We'll take it from the top.
And action.
Coach Stan, what are you doing here?
I came to see if everything was okay. We missed your tryouts today.
ko: 모든 게 괜찮은지 보러 왔어. 오늘 너의 트라이아웃을 놓쳤어.

en: Yeah, I, uh... I had some stuff I had to do.
ko: 응, 나... 할 일이 좀 있었어.

en: Look, Robbie, you're good.
What's up?
You're gonna have scouts lined up waiting to give you a full ride today.
ko: 오늘 너에게 장학금을 주려고 스카우트들이 줄 서 있을 거야.
